Package com.rays.dto

Class UserDTO

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDTO
      • com.rays.dto.UserDTO
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DropdownList
    @Entity
public class UserDTO
extends BaseDTO
    UserDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the User entity. This class extends BaseDTO and represents a system user with authentication and authorization details.

    This DTO stores user details including personal information, login credentials, role information, account status, login attempts, and profile image reference. It implements the required methods for unique key identification using login ID.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      • getUniqueKey

        public java.lang.String getUniqueKey()
        Gets the unique key attribute name for this DTO. The login ID serves as the unique key for users.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueKey in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "loginId" as the unique key attribute

      • getUniqueValue

        public java.lang.String getUniqueValue()
        Gets the value of the unique key attribute for this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getUniqueValue in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        the login ID as the unique value

      • getLabel

        public java.lang.String getLabel()
        Gets the display label for this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getLabel in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "Login Id" as the display label

      • getTableName

        public java.lang.String getTableName()
        Gets the table name associated with this DTO.
        Specified by:
        getTableName in class BaseDTO
        Returns:
        "User" as the table name

      • getValue

        public java.lang.String getValue()
        Gets the value for dropdown display. This implementation returns null as users are not typically displayed in dropdowns.
        Returns:
        null
